<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.PartyToParticipant">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-partytoparticipant">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">party</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the party that is to be represented by the participants</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">threshold</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the signatory threshold required by the participants to be able to act on behalf of the party. a mapping with threshold &gt; 1 is considered a definition of a consortium party</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">participants</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated HostingParticipant</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">which participants will host the party. if threshold &gt; 1, must be Confirmation or Observation. if all participants have Observation permission, the confirmation treshold is ignored, making the party a purely observing party.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">party_signing_keys</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeysWithThreshold</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Contains protocol signing keys for the party used to authorize externally signed Daml transactions, along with a signing threshold. The max number of keys is 20</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.protocol.v30.PartyToParticipant.HostingParticipant">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-protocol-v30-partytoparticipant-hostingparticipant">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">participant_uid</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">string</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the target participant that the party should be mapped to</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">permission</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">ParticipantPermission</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">permission of the participant for this particular party (the actual will be min of ParticipantSynchronizerPermission.ParticipantPermission and this setting)</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">onboarding</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">Onboarding</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">optional, present iff the party is being onboarded to the participant</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SigningKeysWithThreshold">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signingkeyswiththreshold">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">keys</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated SigningPublicKey</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the designated signing keys</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">threshold</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">uint32</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">the authorization threshold</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.SigningPublicKey">
<div class="x2mdx-ref-schema" id="schema-com-digitalasset-canton-crypto-v30-signingpublickey">
  
  
<div class="x2mdx-ref-fields">
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">format</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">CryptoKeyFormat</span>
      
    </div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">public_key</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">bytes</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Serialized public key in the format specified above</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">scheme</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeyScheme</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">No longer used (only kept for backwards compatibility) stores both the crypto key scheme and algorithm.</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">usage</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">repeated SigningKeyUsage</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">Explicitly state the key&#x27;s intended use</div>
    
  </div>
  
  <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-row">
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-main">
      <code class="x2mdx-ref-field-name">key_spec</code>
      <span class="x2mdx-ref-type-badge">SigningKeySpec</span>
      
    </div>
    
    <div class="x2mdx-ref-field-description">The key specification that was used to generate the key pair</div>
    
  </div>
  
</div>

  
  
</div>
</Accordion>

<Accordion title="com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.v30.CryptoKeyFormat">

</AccordionGroup>


</div>

<div className="x2mdx-ref-right-rail" role="complementary" aria-label="Examples and responses">
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">grpcurl</span>
  
</div>

```bash grpcurl
# Add -plaintext if the server is not using TLS.
grpcurl \
  -d @ \
  <HOST:PORT> \
  com.digitalasset.canton.topology.admin.v30.TopologyManagerReadService/ListPartyToParticipant <<'EOF'
{
  "baseQuery": {
    "store": {
      "authorized": {}
    },
    "proposals": true,
    "operation": "TOPOLOGY_CHANGE_OP_UNSPECIFIED",
    "snapshot": "string",
    "filterSignedKey": "string",
    "protocolVersion": 0
  },
  "filterParty": "string",
  "filterParticipant": "string"
}
EOF
```

</div>
  </div>
  
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-panel">
  <div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-code x2mdx-ref-rail-code--response">
<div className="x2mdx-ref-rail-head">
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-rail-heading">OK</span>
  
  <span className="x2mdx-ref-response-label">application/json</span>
  
</div>

```json OK
{
  "results": [
    {
      "context": {
        "store": {
          "authorized": {}
        },
        "sequenced": "string",
        "validFrom": "string",
        "validUntil": "string",
        "operation": "TOPOLOGY_CHANGE_OP_UNSPECIFIED",
        "transactionHash": "BASE64_ENCODED_BYTES",
        "serial": 0,
        "signedByFingerprints": [
          "string"
        ]
      },
      "item": {
        "party": "string",
        "threshold": 0,
        "participants": [
          {
            "participantUid": "string",
            "permission": "PARTICIPANT_PERMISSION_UNSPECIFIED",
            "onboarding": {}
          }
        ],
        "partySigningKeys": {
          "keys": [
            {}
          ],
          "threshold": 0
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

</div>
  </div>
  
</div>

</div>
